title: Rryan
compiled_truth: Rryan is an external contact at [Isda](companies/isda). Over the corpus period (1999-12-15 to 2001-06-04), Rryan sent 3 and received 45 emails, totalling 48 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark E Haedicke](people/mark-e-haedicke) (2), [Scarey](people/scarey-isda) (2), [Rainslie](people/rainslie-isda) (2), [Martin Chavez](people/martin-chavez-kiodex) (1), [Lclemmons](people/lclemmons-elementre) (1).
